questions.question: Describe the core principles of an Agile process. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Agile principles relate to iterative, flexible, and customer-centric development

questions.question: What is Extreme Programming (XP)? (5 marks)
questions.hint: XP is a software development methodology characterized by technical practices such as pair programming, continuous integration, and test-driven development

questions.question: Compare and contrast Scrum and Kanban as Agile process models. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the key differences in their approach to team roles, ceremonies, and workflow visualization

questions.question: List three essential tools used in Agile processes. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Tools like Jira, Asana, or Trello can be used for project planning, tracking, and team collaboration
